description: A bent H₂O molecule with CPK colouring. Rotate it to explore the 104.5° bond angle, switch between ball-and-stick and space-filling models, and toggle a colourblind-safe palette.

A procedural caffeine model with a fused xanthine ring, four nitrogens, two carbonyl oxygens, and three methyl groups. Rotate it to discuss molecular structure, switch model styles, highlight the ring scaffold, and toggle a colourblind-safe palette.

A procedural Earth globe generated from Natural Earth 1:10m land, lake, river, bathymetry, glacier, ice-shelf, and elevation-point vectors, with a UTC date/time-aware solar terminator, axial tilt, graticule guides, and optional NASA Black Marble night lights for studying day, night, terrain, and seasons.
attribution: Physical vectors: Natural Earth public domain; night lights: NASA Earth Observatory Black Marble
parameterSchemaJson: {"solarMode":{"type":"enum","label":"Solar date","default":"realtime","options":[{"value":"realtime","label":"Live UTC date/time"},{"value":"custom-date-time","label":"Custom day/time"},{"value":"march-equinox","label":"March equinox"},{"value":"june-solstice","label":"June solstice"},{"value":"december-solstice","label":"December solstice"}]},"dayOfYear":{"type":"number","label":"Day of year","default":172,"min":1,"max":366,"step":1},"utcHour":{"type":"number","label":"UTC hour","default":12,"min":0,"max":23.75,"step":0.25},"rotationPeriodSeconds":{"type":"number","label":"Rotation period","default":90,"min":0,"max":240,"step":5},"nightLightsVisible":{"type":"boolean","label":"Night lights","default":true},"bathymetryVisible":{"type":"boolean","label":"Ocean depth bands","default":true},"iceVisible":{"type":"boolean","label":"Glaciers and ice shelves","default":true},"elevationMarkersVisible":{"type":"boolean","label":"Major elevation markers","default":true},"graticuleVisible":{"type":"boolean","label":"Latitude/longitude grid","default":true},"atmosphereVisible":{"type":"boolean","label":"Atmosphere glow","default":true}}
